behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert specific implementation details not in instruction.md: exact loop `for ($attempt = 0; $attempt < 5; $attempt++)`, `usleep(100_000)` with 100ms delay, `$attempt === 4` check, and target file path `src/Appwrite/Platform/Modules/Databases/Http/VectorsDB/Collections/Create.php` — none of which are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem and required behavior (retry, catch DuplicateException, retry with delay) without specifying exact line numbers or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests rigidly enforce gold specifics: `for ($attempt = 0; $attempt < 5; $attempt++)` (test_retry_loop_structure), `usleep(100_000)` exactly (test_usleep_retry_delay), `$attempt === 4` (test_max_attempts_check), and variable name `$attempt` — alternative correct fixes using `$i`, `while` loops, 3 retries, or 200ms delays would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most f2p tests (test_bootstrap_comment_present, test_retry_loop_structure, test_duplicate_exception_handling, test_usleep_retry_delay, etc.) only regex-search the source file; only php -l, composer lint/analyze execute subprocesses, and none actually exercise concurrent bootstrap behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: The text-based tests do require specific patterns be present, so a pass/stub wouldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors in instruction.md (comments, retry, DuplicateException, usleep, max attempts) are checked.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and a clear pass-to-pass section separator.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in filenames or commands.
